name: Ember and Salt
specialty: Specializing in unconventional extraction jobs, Ember and Salt have a reputation for navigating the treacherous rifts with an uncanny precision that sets them apart.

members.name: Aela Ironwhisper
members.note: Aela wears a silver circlet, a gift from her late father, on her brow, a reminder of her noble lineage.

members.name: Kael Saltwind
members.note: Kael carries a set of obsidian tracking knives, a grim memento from his time with the Wardens of Ash.

visual: Aela, with her elven grace, leads the way through the Undercity in a cloak of midnight-blue silk, her silver circlet glinting under the dim light. Kael, a hardened man, follows, his lean frame wrapped in a leather jacket and a wide-brimmed hat, obscuring his features.
reputation_note: While some whisper of their mysterious past, all agree that Ember and Salt are a force to be reckoned with, their names striking fear in the hearts of criminals and respect in the hearts of those in need.
